equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 300 damage, and any damage you take will deal at least 50% of your health.
equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon two additional Lightning bolts.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every Energy regeneration point.
equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the same damage as Chain Lightning.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain additional 2% damage bonus for each extra inventory slot

equipmentMods.amulet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.goblet: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.

equipmentMods.helmet: If you are using a melee weapon, gain 15 Armor for each stance mastery level.
equipmentMods.ring2: Gain 500 Wisdom if no offhands are equipped.

equipmentMods.amulet: Your Secondary Ability costs double energy, but deals 150% more damage.
equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give stacks of Blood, increasing your Physical Damage by 1% per stack, up to 100
equipmentMods.goblet: Вихрь: Каждый Вихрь призывает два маленьких вихря, которые наносят 50% урона.
equipmentMods.helmet: Gain 3% Fire Damage for each Critical Chance above 100%
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.relic: Each time you get hit,  Gain 15% more damage up to 75%. Blessing is 30 seconds long.
equipmentMods.trinket: Вихрь: Получаете усиление, дающее +4% к Урону Молнией когда вихри сокрушаются друг с другом и получаете +10% урона за каждый Вихрь.
equipmentMods.boots: +10% к шансу появления контейнера при убийстве элитного противника.

equipmentMods.goblet: Starblades: Starblades have a 25% chance of striking twice.
equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.

equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Containers in ruptures have a chance to drop large gems.
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
